templates.name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
templates.description: Standard terms for a mutual NDA allowing each party to share confidential information for a stated purpose. Covers use restrictions, exceptions, term, return of information, and governing law. Created by a committee of over 40 attorneys.

templates.name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
templates.description: Cover page template to execute the Common Paper Mutual NDA. Parties fill in the purpose, effective date, MNDA term, confidentiality period, governing law, and signatures to complete the agreement.

templates.name: Cloud Service Agreement
templates.description: Comprehensive agreement for selling and buying cloud software and SaaS products. Covers subscription access, user accounts, privacy, payment, IP rights, warranties, liability caps, indemnification, and confidentiality.

templates.name: Service Level Agreement
templates.description: Supplement to the Common Paper CSA defining uptime targets, response time targets, service credit calculations and limitations, and termination rights when targets are repeatedly missed.

templates.name: Design Partner Agreement
templates.description: Agreement for early product access in exchange for structured feedback. Covers the feedback program, IP ownership (provider owns all feedback), confidentiality, product improvement rights, and term and termination.

templates.name: Professional Services Agreement
templates.description: Governs the provision of professional services including deliverables, IP assignment, subcontractors, payment, confidentiality, indemnification, and insurance. Structured around a framework with individual Statements of Work.

templates.name: Data Processing Agreement
templates.description: GDPR-compliant agreement governing the processing of personal data by a service provider on behalf of a customer. Covers processor/subprocessor relationships, restricted transfers (EEA SCCs, UK Addendum), security incident response, and audit rights.

templates.name: Partnership Agreement
templates.description: Standard agreement for business partnerships covering mutual obligations, trademark licensing, payment terms, escalation procedures, confidentiality, indemnification, and liability limitations.

templates.name: Software License Agreement
templates.description: Governs on-premise or locally installed software licensing. Covers license grant, usage restrictions, open source software, updates, payment, warranties, liability caps, indemnification, and confidentiality.

templates.name: Pilot Agreement
templates.description: Short-term evaluation agreement allowing a prospective customer to test a product before committing to a full commercial contract. Covers pilot access, usage restrictions, liability caps, confidentiality, and termination.

templates.name: Business Associate Agreement
templates.description: HIPAA-compliant agreement governing the handling of Protected Health Information (PHI) by a service provider on behalf of a covered entity. Covers safeguards, subcontractor requirements, breach notification, and individual rights.

templates.name: AI Addendum
templates.description: Addendum to supplement existing agreements with AI-specific terms covering AI service usage, model training restrictions, output ownership (assigned to customer), personal data obligations, and disclaimers about AI-generated content.
